_comment_: Descriptor for a single GrooveBoxRack machine. Pass this file to rackgen.js to scaffold a new voice. Field-by-field:
_comment_id: the short machine id, used in synthdefinitions.json's `machines` list and in the WebUI param group prefixes (`ch<track+1>_<id>_*`). Keep it ≤6 chars, lowercase, no spaces. Must be unique across `machines`.
_comment_className: C++ class name (PascalCase). Convention is Rack<Something>. Required.
_comment_name: Human-readable name shown in the WebUI machine tab.
_comment_type: 'drum' (one-shot, triggered by a fixed note on a fixed channel) or 'synth' (pitched, noteOn/noteOff).
_comment_track: 0-based track index. Drum tracks are 0..7 (WebUI CH01..CH08), synth tracks 8..14 (CH09..CH15). See synthdefinitions.json — the type and target track must agree.
_comment_params: Up to ~30 parameters per machine. `ctrl` is the per-machine MIDI CC number (convention: machine params start at 8; the channel mixer occupies 1..7). `def` is the default value 0..127 (rackgen scales it to the 0..4096 preset range).
name: My Voice
